message.content: ```plantuml @startuml title PB-351 UC23 - View Offers Details on System Management skinparam shadowing false skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam sequence { ParticipantPadding 30 BoxPadding 20 MessageAlign left LifeLineBorderColor #666666 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF } caption Abstract: This use case will retrieve details of a specific Offer. This endpoint already exists on the Partners and Offers platform, but we have to add on response the new fields. endcaption actor "UI (System Admin and Manager - System Management)" as UI box "Partners and Offers Platform" #DDDDDD participant "Next Platform" as NP database "Next Database" as ND end box UI -> NP : 1 HTTP\nGET /offers/{offerId} note right of NP #FFA500 Note to developers Add these fields on response: 1.. benefit 2.. listImage 3.. listImageVersion 4.. partnerName Also, change the type of: 5.. startDate 6.. endDate To consider timestamp from now on. end note note right of NP #DDA0DD For partnerName consider the field 'FANTASY_NAME' in PATNER table. end note NP --> UI : 2 response @enduml ```
